title: Exposing Team hierarchy in monday API
excerpt:

posts.author: baswienhoven (Bas Wienhoven)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

We’ve been getting a lot of requests regarding confusion about team hierarchy. Users or our apps expect to get the same experience monday.com is offering them and one thing that we can’t show is their structure/hierarchy in teams.

My request is to exposed this hierarchy through the monday.com API, that would be great!

On our side this would open up the opportunity to be smart about permissions, timesheet approvals and reporting. Say your have 4 layers of teams and you’re have the manager permission role in level 2, you could automatically a manager for teams you’re a part of on level 3 and 4 without being explicit about this.

This saves the users a lot of time in managing permissions while keeping it granular enough.

Looking forward to hearing if this is planned, and if so when?
